title: InnerRipple, on device health scoring against your own Apple Watch baseline
abstract: InnerRipple is your personal health guardian, giving you a clear and easy-to-understand health score based on your own Apple Watch baseline. Imagine starting each morning with a warm cup of coffee—now do it with a glance at your InnerRipple health score. Make health management simple and fun! Give it a try and see the difference for yourself.
abstract_zh: InnerRipple 是个你自己的私人健康守护神！别再盯着那些冷冰冰的数字了，它能根据你自己Apple Watch的数据基准，给你一个直观易懂的身体状况评分。就像每天早晨醒来喝一杯暖心的咖啡一样，看看你的健康分数，轻松掌握身体状况。快来试试吧， InnerRipple 让健康管理变得简单又有趣！
